headline: Is VeriSign, Inc. (VRSN) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is VRSN a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on VeriSign, Inc. on The Finance Corner’s Substack by Kostadin Ristovski, ACCA. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on VRSN. VeriSign, Inc.’s share was trading at $275.81 as of April 20th. VRSN’s trailing and forward P/E were 31.31 and 29.41 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. […]
